_publications._publicationTitle: A Systematic Assessment of Accuracy in Detecting Somatic Mosaic Variants by Deep Amplicon Sequencing: Application to NF2 Gene.

_contextSnippet: Using fast COLD-PCR protocol, the mutated allele was selectively amplified as much as necessary to confirm the alteration using sequencing analysis
details: Successfully enriched minority allele in COLD-PCR protocol to confirm c.459C>A variant with 2.4% VAF that was undetectable by standard Sanger sequencing
